The Studio

Precision.
Restraint.
Resonance.

Helios Audio is a boutique sonic design studio working at the intersection of music, narrative, and technology. Every project is approached with compositional rigour and a deep understanding of how sound shapes human perception.

We work directly with directors, publishers, and studios — keeping communication tight and creative standards uncompromising.
